description: Bump all outdated dependencies in the docs site to their latest versions: biome 2.4.5→2.4.6 (pinned exact), lucide-react ^0.575.0→^0.577.0 (0.x semver), and run npm update to resolve all in-range patches. Fix the @types/node@25 misinstall by cleaning node_modules.
qualityChecks: cd docs && npm run build && npm run type-check && npm run lint && npm run knip && npm run format:check

userStories.title: Bump biome, lucide-react, and resolve all in-range patches in docs
userStories.description: Update @biomejs/biome from 2.4.5 to 2.4.6, bump lucide-react range from ^0.575.0 to ^0.577.0, then clean node_modules and run npm install + npm update to fix the @types/node@25 misinstall and resolve all in-range patches.
acceptanceCriteria: npm run build completes without errors in docs/
userStories.notes:
Files:
- docs/package.json (bump biome and lucide-react)

Context:
The docs site is a standalone project with its own node_modules (no lockfile). Current outdated deps:
- `"@biomejs/biome": "2.4.5"` (line 46) — pinned exact, bump to 2.4.6
- `"lucide-react": "^0.575.0"` (line 27) — 0.x semver, must bump range to ^0.577.0
- Several in-range patches available: @content-collections/core 0.14.1→0.14.2, @icons-pack/react-simple-icons 13.11.2→13.12.0, @tailwindcss/postcss 4.2.0→4.2.1, knip 5.84.1→5.86.0, postcss 8.5.6→8.5.8, rehype-pretty-code 0.14.1→0.14.3, tailwindcss 4.2.0→4.2.1
- `@types/node` is currently installed at 25.3.0 despite `^22.15.0` range — this is a stale install bug

Changes:
1. In docs/package.json, change `"@biomejs/biome": "2.4.5"` to `"@biomejs/biome": "2.4.6"`
2. In docs/package.json, change `"lucide-react": "^0.575.0"` to `"lucide-react": "^0.577.0"`
3. Run `rm -rf docs/node_modules` to clean stale installs
4. Run `cd docs && npm install && npm update` to get fresh, correct versions
5. Verify @types/node resolved to 22.x: `node -e "console.log(require('./docs/node_modules/@types/node/package.json').version)"`

Constraints:
- Do NOT add ^ prefix to biome — it's intentionally pinned exact.
- Do NOT change the @types/node range — it must stay at ^22.15.0 (Node 22 LTS target).
- Do NOT modify any source files (.ts/.tsx/.mdx) — only package.json and node_modules change.
- The docs dir has NO package-lock.json — that's intentional.
